content: Self-Refine's task-agnostic iterative self-improvement framework can be augmented by integrating multiple inconsistent perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to break the 'local optimum trap' that single-perspective self-feedback often falls into. This creates a new zero-training self-refinement approach that retains Self-Refine's advantage of requiring no extra supervised data or model training while resolving its limitation of biased feedback.
